name: vibe-coding
description: Vibe Coding B+ workflow plugin with repo skill, Codex hook bundle, and project-local scaffold templates for context-engineered AI coding.

interface.shortDescription: B+ workflow for Codex hooks, project-local verification, filesystem context, and ADR-backed agentic development.
interface.longDescription: Packages the vibe-coding-3 skill plus hook and scaffold templates for local Vibe Coding B+ workflows. Runtime hooks in installed projects should call project-local scripts, not plugin or skill scripts.
defaultPrompt: Use $vibe-coding-3 to initialize or operate a Vibe Coding B+ project.
Run project-local verification before reporting completion.
